subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Paradoxical Undressing
description: A quick, practical guide to Paradoxical Undressing.

hook.text: Rescue teams find hypothermia victims naked in the snow. They took their own clothes off. Why?

buildup.text: In severe hypothermia, the brain becomes severely confused as core temperature drops.

discovery.text: Constricted blood vessels suddenly dilate, flooding cold skin with warm blood—a false sensation of heat.

twist.text: The confused victim feels overwhelmingly hot and strips their clothing off in freezing conditions.

climax.text: Paradoxical undressing is a sign of severe, life-threatening hypothermia—not irrational behavior.

punchline.text: Feeling hot while freezing to death. The brain's final trick.

quiz.question: What causes paradoxical undressing in hypothermia?
options: Blood vessels suddenly dilate, creating a false sensation of extreme heat
The victim is delirious from fear
Their clothing becomes painful against cold skin
